description.ko: 떠 있는 유리 고리 사이로 빠른 백색 에너지가 굴절되며 밝은 무지개 카우스틱과 선명한 색수차를 만든다.
description.en: Fast white energy bends through floating glass loops, releasing bright rainbow caustics and crisp chromatic fringes.

prompt: PRISM-2 refraction sprint in a blazing white aperture space: a weightless array of ultra-clear glass Mobius loops, slotted optical gates, and hair-thin curved waveguide strips spirals around a vertical white light surge. The surge fractures through the loops in rapid offset flashes, producing light dispersion as sharp airborne ribbons of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics flicker like folded mesh, split fan arcs, and luminous interference stitches across the empty air, while every polished glass edge shows precise chromatic aberration and bright internal refraction paths. Keep the image high-key and radiant, with low sparse particles, fast spectral motion trails, crystalline transparency, pure rainbow energy, and no dark surface, tabletop setup, or traditional triangular prism.
